summary_cn: 芭提雅市政厅正在推进收回公共用地及拓宽道路的项目。工作人员开始对Soi Pornprapanimit 2巷沿线的违规占地建筑进行清理。在拆除路边神龛前，芭提雅市政厅基础设施发展总监提普猜（Thipchai Rattanaveerathavorn）遵循泰国传统习俗进行祭拜，以示尊重。此举既展现了地方官员对传统信仰的敬畏，也标志着城市基础建设项目的稳步实施。
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）官员清理被占公地前祭拜神龛，推行道路拓宽工程

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）铁路平交道口附近发生惨剧：重型机车高速追尾导致车手丧生
desc_original: Rescue workers and police inspect the scene of a fatal motorcycle collision on a railway-side road near Wat Tham Samakkhi, where a big bike rider was killed after a high-speed crash late at night in Pattaya. PATTAYA, Thailand – A big bike rider was killed in a late-night motorcycle collision near a railway crossing in Pattaya , after reportedly crashing at high speed into another motorcycle. Rescue volunteers from the Sawang Boriboon were alerted to the accident at around 10:00 p.m. on March 11 along the railway-side road behind Wat Tham Samakkhi , heading toward Huai Yai in Nongprue sub-distr
summary_cn: 3月11日晚约10点，芭提雅（Pattaya）Wat Tham Samakkhi寺庙后的铁路边路段发生严重交通事故。一名重型机车骑士在高速行驶中与另一辆摩托车相撞，由于撞击力度剧烈，该骑士当场丧生。救援组织Sawang Boriboon及警方随即赶往现场处理。目前事故原因仍在进一步调查中。该路段通往农普（Nongprue）子县的会艾（Huai Yai）地区，夜间行车安全需高度警惕。
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）铁路平交道口附近发生惨剧：重型机车高速追尾导致车手丧生

title: 佛统府（Nakhon Pathom）金店遭劫：持枪蒙面贼鸣枪示威掠走350万泰铢金饰

PATTAYA, Thailand – A lone gunman walked calmly into a gold shop inside a shopping mall in Nakhon Pathom, pointed a gun at staff, forced them to bag gold necklaces, fired a shot while escaping, and rode off on a motorcycle with about 46 baht weight of gold worth roughly 3.5 million baht. The robbery, captured on CCTV, happened on the evening of March 11. The suspect, described as
summary_cn: 3月11日晚，佛统府（Nakhon Pathom）一间商场内的金店发生恶性抢劫案。一名头戴头盔的持枪歹徒平静闯入店内，威胁员工将金项链装袋。在逃离现场时，嫌疑人还开了一枪示威，随后骑摩托车逃逸。此次抢劫共掠走重约46铢的黄金首饰，价值约350万泰铢。目前警方正通过监控摄像追踪该嫌疑人。此类案件频繁发生再次引发了对商场安保水平的关注。
title_cn: 佛统府（Nakhon Pathom）金店遭劫：持枪蒙面贼鸣枪示威掠走350万泰铢金饰

title: 中东局势加剧担忧：泰国密切监控航司燃油供应及价格走势
desc_original: Sarun Benjanirat chairs a meeting of the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT) with representatives from government agencies and energy firms including PTT Public Company Limited and Bangchak Corporation to discuss potential impacts of global oil price volatility on Thailand’s aviation fuel supply. PATTAYA, Thailand – Thailand’s aviation authorities are monitoring jet fuel prices amid concerns that tensions in the Middle East could affect global energy markets and the aviation sector. The Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT) held a meeting on March 11 to assess the situation surro
summary_cn: 受中东地区紧张局势影响，泰国正严密监控航空燃油供应情况，以防全球油价波动冲击本土航空业。3月11日，泰国中央民航局（CAAT）副局长萨伦（Sarun Benjanirat）召集泰国国家石油公司（PTT）及邦查克（Bangchak）等能源巨头召开紧急会议，评估市场风险。泰国政府旨在确保民航业运行稳定，防止因中东冲突导致的燃料短缺或成本激增影响国际旅游业务的恢复。
title_cn: 中东局势加剧担忧：泰国密切监控航司燃油供应及价格走势

title: 普吉岛 Sensei Padel 俱乐部：芭东（Patong）下班后运动与桑拿新去处
desc_original: Sensei Padel Club Phuket is your new after-work sport and sauna stop in Patong Legacy Living in Phuket means you already have the beach, the cafés, and the sunset walks. What you might be missing is a sport that’s social, easy to pick up, and close to home. Well, Sensei Padel Club Phuket is your answer. It’s currently the only padel venue in Patong and nearby areas, which makes it a handy option if you stay or live in town. You don’t need to be an athlete to enjoy it either. This place is built for curious beginners, casual players, and anyone who likes their exercise served with a side of chi
summary_cn: 位于普吉岛（Phuket）芭东（Patong）地区的 Sensei Padel 俱乐部正式开业，为当地居民和游客提供了下班后运动与社交的新选择。该俱乐部是目前芭东及其周边唯一的板网球（Padel）场地，结合了板网球运动与桑拿设施。板网球上手简单且具有很强的社交属性，适合各种运动水平的人群。对于工作并在芭东生活的群体来说，该设施的地理位置优越，无需长途跋涉即可享受健身体验。
title_cn: 普吉岛 Sensei Padel 俱乐部：芭东（Patong）下班后运动与桑拿新去处

title: 芭提雅（Pattaya）官员严密监控易涝区，应对降雨引发的积水担忧

PATTAYA, Thailand – Municipal officers across Pattaya have been deployed to monitor flood-prone locations following rainfall that raised concerns about possible water accumulation on city roads. Teams from Pattaya’s municipal enforcement units, including officers from Naklua and Jomtien, were dispatched on March 12 to inspect areas known to experience temporary flooding during heavy rain. Officials said the patrols aim t
summary_cn: 3月12日芭提雅（Pattaya）降雨后，市政府官员已全员出动，严密监控市内易涝路段。包括纳库鲁阿（Naklua）和中天（Jomtien）在内的执法小组已在关键节点驻守，随时观测积水情况并协助过往车辆，以确保交通安全。此次行动旨在应对短时强降雨可能导致的街道内涝，将对市民和游客日常出行的影响降至最低，目前官员仍保持高度警惕。
title_cn: 芭提雅（Pattaya）官员严密监控易涝区，应对降雨引发的积水担忧

title: 诺博地产（Noble）坚持轻资产战略，寻求合资及公寓租赁合作伙伴
desc_original: SET-listed Noble Development plans to maintain its asset-light strategy by seeking partners for joint ventures in new projects and investors to purchase rental condo units, a business it launched late last year.
summary_cn: 泰股上市开发商诺博地产（Noble Development）宣布将继续推行轻资产战略。该公司计划为新开发项目寻找合资伙伴，并吸引投资者购买其去年底推出的租赁型公寓单位（Rental Condo）。此举旨在通过合作开发和快速回笼资金来优化资产负债表，在保持业务增长的同时降低资金压力，反映出泰国头部开发商在当前房地产市场环境下对财务稳健性的重视。
title_cn: 诺博地产（Noble）坚持轻资产战略，寻求合资及公寓租赁合作伙伴

title: 夏季风暴预警：芭提雅（Pattaya）将迎来雷雨及强风天气
desc_original: Foreign tourists sunbathe on Pattaya Beach, as tourism thrives in March and hot weather draws crowds to the shore despite forecasters warning of possible thunderstorms and gusty winds in the Pattaya area. (Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – Forecasters are warning of summer storms across parts of Thailand over the next 24 hours, bringing thunderstorms, strong winds and the possibility of heavy rain, while coastal cities such as Pattaya could also see unsettled weather. According to the Thai Meteorological Department, upper Thailand may experience seasonal summer storms characterized
summary_cn: 泰国气象局发出夏季风暴预警，预计未来24小时内泰国上部地区及芭提雅（Pattaya）等沿海城市将出现雷阵雨、阵风和局部大雨。尽管目前芭提雅海滩游客云集，天气炎热，但气象专家提醒注意天气突变。夏季风暴通常伴有剧烈天气变化，建议在泰游客关注最新气象信息，在强风或雷雨发生时避免停留在空旷地带或简易棚下。此轮不稳定天气由季节更替引起。
title_cn: 夏季风暴预警：芭提雅（Pattaya）将迎来雷雨及强风天气

title: 阿努廷（Anutin）确认执政联盟组建完成，排除民主党及 Klatham 党
desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has confirmed that the government coalition lineup has been finalised, with the main partners being the Bhumjaithai Party and the Pheu Thai Party, along with several smaller parties.
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）公开确认，新一届政府执政联盟的职能名单已最终敲定。核心合作伙伴为自豪泰党（Bhumjaithai）和为泰党（Pheu Thai），并辅以数个小型政党。阿努廷明确表示，由于组阁已趋于稳定和完善，排除目前将 Klatham 党和民主党（Democrat Party）纳入联盟的可能性。此番表态旨在展示现任政府的团结，并平息关于政治权力分配的各类猜测。
title_cn: 阿努廷（Anutin）确认执政联盟组建完成，排除民主党及 Klatham 党

title: 国民党 (People’s Party) 就泄露成员激光号个人信息道歉
desc: The People’s Party has apologised for a data breach after it collected members’ laser ID codes, exposing them to identity theft and scam risks from misuse of personal data.
desc_original: The People’s Party has apologised for a data breach after it collected members’ laser ID codes, exposing them to identity theft and scam risks from misuse of personal data.
title_cn: 国民党 (People’s Party) 就泄露成员激光号个人信息道歉
summary_cn: 泰国国民党（People’s Party）近日因泄露党员个人激光代码（Laser ID）而公开道歉。该党承认在收集成员信息过程中存在疏忽，导致敏感信息面临暴露风险，可能增加身份被盗用和网络诈骗的威胁。激光代码通常印在泰国身份证背面，属于高等级隐私数据。此举旨在提醒受影响成员加强警惕，防止因个人资料被不当利用而造成经济损失。

title: 正义力量党 (Klatham Party) 下议员因网络赌博案获准保释
desc: The Criminal Court on Thursday released Klatham Party MP Chonnaput Naksua on 1-million-baht bail, with a ban on travel abroad, while investigators continue to gather evidence on his alleged links to an online gambling ring.
desc_original: The Criminal Court on Thursday released Klatham Party MP Chonnaput Naksua on 1-million-baht bail, with a ban on travel abroad, while investigators continue to gather evidence on his alleged links to an online gambling ring.
title_cn: 正义力量党 (Klatham Party) 下议员因网络赌博案获准保释
summary_cn: 泰国刑事法院周四批准正义力量党（Klatham Party）下议员冲纳帕（Chonnaput Naksua）的保释申请，保释金定为100万泰铢。此前他被指控涉嫌与大型网络赌博犯罪团伙有关联。法院在批准保释的同时签发了禁令，严禁其在调查期间出境。目前调查人员仍在深度收集相关证据，以厘清其在非法赌博链条中所扮演的角色。

title: 泰国成功入围 2030 年世界骄傲节 (WorldPride) 申办首轮角逐
desc: BANGKOK — Thailand has advanced to the first round in its bid to host the global LGBTQ+ event WorldPride 2030 , with Bangkok competing alongside London and Barcelona , officials said. The development was discussed at a preparatory meeting on 11 March chaired by Natthriya Thaweevong, Permanent Secretary of the Ministry of Tourism and Sports, as authorities and partners coordinated efforts to strengthen Thailand’s proposal. The meeting brought together representatives from the Ministry of Tourism and Sports, the Department of Tourism, the Tourism Authority of Thailand, the Thailand Convention an

The development was discussed at a preparatory meeting on 11 March chaired by Natthriya Thaweevong, Permanent Secretary of the Ministry of Tourism and Sports, as authorities and partners coordinated efforts to strengthen Thailand’s proposal.

title: 霍尔木兹海峡 (Hormuz) 泰方货船遭袭，泰国要求伊朗公开道歉
desc: BANGKOK — Thailand has lodged a formal protest with Iran following an incident in which a Thai-flagged cargo ship was hit and damaged while sailing in the Strait of Hormuz, affecting 23 Thai crew members on board. On 12 March 2026, Sirilak Niyom, Deputy Permanent Secretary for Foreign Affairs, held talks with Nassereddin Heidari, Ambassador of the Islamic Republic of Iran to Thailand, according to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of Thailand. During the meeting, Sirilak raised concerns over the incident involving the Thai-flagged cargo ship Mayuree Naree, which was struck and damaged while sail
desc_original: BANGKOK — Thailand has lodged a formal protest with Iran following an incident in which a Thai-flagged cargo ship was hit and damaged while sailing in the Strait of Hormuz, affecting 23 Thai crew members on board. On 12 March 2026, Sirilak Niyom, Deputy Permanent Secretary for Foreign Affairs, held talks with Nassereddin Heidari, Ambassador of the Islamic Republic of Iran to Thailand.
title_cn: 霍尔木兹海峡 (Hormuz) 泰方货船遭袭，泰国要求伊朗公开道歉
summary_cn: 泰国政府向伊朗提出正式抗议，原因是近日一艘悬挂泰国国旗的货船“Mayuree Naree”号在霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）航行时遭到袭击。事件发生时船上有23名泰国籍船员，船体受到损坏。泰国部副秘书长西里拉克（Sirilak Niyom）与伊朗驻泰大使纳塞雷丁（Nassereddin Heidari）进行了严正交涉，表达了对航行安全的高度关注，并要求伊朗方面就此次攻击行为作出正式道歉并承担相应责任。

Both victims were reported to be in critical condition. Sichon Police Station officers and Por Teck Tung Foundation rescuers were called to a house in Si Khit sub-district, Sichon district at around 4.30am yesterday, March 11, to assist the victims. desc_original: Mentally ill man attacks mother and daughter with knife in Nakhon Si Thammarat. A mentally ill Thai man turned himself in after breaking into a neighbour’s home in Nakhon Si Thammarat and attacking a woman and her teenage daughter with a knife. Both victims were reported to be in critical condition.
title_cn: 洛坤府 (Nakhon Si Thammarat) 患病男子持刀袭击邻居母女遭逮捕
summary_cn: 在泰国洛坤府（Nakhon Si Thammarat）的西春县（Sichon），一名患有严重精神疾患的男子在凌晨时分闯入邻居家中，持有利器猛烈袭击了一对母女。43岁的母亲与16岁的女儿全身多处受伤，目前两人伤势危重正在医院抢救。在当地警方与报德善堂（Por Teck Tung）救援人员赶到现场后，该男子向警方自首。此类案件再次引发泰国社会对精神障碍群体管理及社区安全隐患的深度关注。

title: 美国启动针对包括泰国 (Thailand) 在内16个伙伴国家“不公平贸易”的调查
desc: WASHINGTON — The administration of Donald Trump has launched new trade investigations into what it considers unfair trade practices, seeking to rebuild tariff pressure after the US Supreme Court struck down much of Trump’s global tariff programme last month. On 11 March in Washington, D.C., the US government announced an investigation into excess industrial capacity among 16 major trading partners, including Thailand. US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said the probe under Section 301 of US trade law could lead to new tariffs on China, the European Union, India, Japan, South Korea and Mexi
desc_original: WASHINGTON — The administration of Donald Trump has launched new trade investigations into what it considers unfair trade practices, seeking to rebuild tariff pressure after the US Supreme Court struck down much of Trump’s global tariff programme last month. On 11 March in Washington, D.C., the US government announced an investigation into excess industrial capacity among 16 major trading partners, including Thailand. US Trade Representative Jamieson Greer said the probe under Section 301 of US trade law could lead to new tariffs on China, the European Union, India, Japan, South Korea and Mexi
summary_cn: 美国特朗普 (Donald Trump) 政府近期启动了针对16个主要贸易伙伴的“不公平贸易”调查。美国政府于3月11日宣布，将重点关注包括泰国、中国、欧盟和日本在内的国家是否存在工业产能过剩。美国贸易代表表示，该调查基于贸易法第301条，可能导致泰国出口商品面临新的关税压力。此次行动被视为美方在最高法院否决部分关税计划后，重新构建贸易保护屏障的尝试，或将对泰国出口制造业产生深远影响。
title_cn: 美国启动针对包括泰国 (Thailand) 在内16个伙伴国家“不公平贸易”的调查

summary_cn: 3月11日，春武里 (Chon Buri) 警方在马普拉昌水库 (Mabprachan Reservoir) 附近的树林中发现一名美籍男游客的尸体。初步调查显示，死者被发现时靠在树上，颈部有绳索。警方在现场发现了一辆摩托车，未见搏斗痕迹。据死者妻子透露，丈夫生前备受健康问题困扰，并在自杀前通过社交媒体向其发送了临终告别视频。警方目前初步断定为自杀，正在处理后续赔偿及遗体回国事宜。
title_cn: 美籍男子在春武里 (Chon Buri) 树林身亡，死前曾向妻子寄送临终视频

title: 泰国总理阿努廷 (Anutin) 谴责针对载有泰籍船员货轮的袭击“不恰当”
desc: BANGKOK — Anutin Charnvirakul, prime minister of Thailand , said the Thai government is mobilising all available resources to assist three Thai crew members aboard the cargo vessel Mayuree Naree who remain near the Strait of Hormuz in Iran, expressing hope that the sailors will remain safe. Speaking on 12 March at the headquarters of the Bhumjaithai Party, Anutin, who also serves as interior minister, said relevant government agencies have been instructed to take all possible steps to help the crew. He added that Thai diplomatic missions have been directed to reach the sailors and provide assi
desc_original: BANGKOK — Anutin Charnvirakul, prime minister of Thailand , said the Thai government is mobilising all available resources to assist three Thai crew members aboard the cargo vessel Mayuree Naree who remain near the Strait of Hormuz in Iran, expressing hope that the sailors will remain safe. Speaking on 12 March at the headquarters of the Bhumjaithai Party, Anutin, who also serves as interior minister, said relevant government agencies have been instructed to take all possible steps to help the crew. He added that Thai diplomatic missions have been directed to reach the sailors and provide assi
summary_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷 (Anutin Charnvirakul) 于3月12日针对在伊朗霍尔木兹海峡 (Strait of Hormuz) 附近滞留的“五月花”号 (Mayuree Naree) 货船事件表态，称针对该船的袭击行为“不恰当”。船上目前有三名待援的泰籍船员。总理表示已动员外交及相关部门资源展开紧急搜救与联络，确保泰籍公民的安全。此次事件涉及敏感的地区局势，泰方政府正在评估货船通航风险，并全力协调船员撤离或受助事宜。
title_cn: 泰国总理阿努廷 (Anutin) 谴责针对载有泰籍船员货轮的袭击“不恰当”

title: 泰国国家健康安全局 (NHSO) 推动泰产医疗创新产品进入“30铢”全民健保系统
desc: BANGKOK — The National Health Security Office (NHSO) is pushing to integrate Thai-developed medical innovations into Thailand’s universal healthcare scheme, with more than 7 billion baht already spent on domestically produced medical products to strengthen the healthcare system while boosting the national economy. The policy direction was outlined at a forum titled “Thai-made, Thai-used, Thai benefits: Medical innovation in the universal healthcare system” held on 12 March at the Khaosod building in Bangkok. The event was organised by the NHSO in collaboration with the Ministry of Public Healt
desc_original: BANGKOK — The National Health Security Office (NHSO) is pushing to integrate Thai-developed medical innovations into Thailand’s universal healthcare scheme, with more than 7 billion baht already spent on domestically produced medical products to strengthen the healthcare system while boosting the national economy. The policy direction was outlined at a forum titled “Thai-made, Thai-used, Thai benefits: Medical innovation in the universal healthcare system” held on 12 March at the Khaosod building in Bangkok. The event was organised by the NHSO in collaboration with the Ministry of Public Healt
summary_cn: 泰国国家健康安全局 (NHSO) 近期宣布，将全力支持泰国本土开发的医疗创新技术纳入全民健康保险体系。截至目前，该计划已投入超过70亿泰铢采购国产医疗物资，旨在通过“泰造、泰用、泰受益”的模式增强国家医疗保障能力，并带动本土经济增长。3月12日在曼谷举行的论坛明确了这一政策导向，希望借助公共卫生系统的采购力，促进泰国高端医疗器械与药物的研发与应用普及。
title_cn: 泰国国家健康安全局 (NHSO) 推动泰产医疗创新产品进入“30铢”全民健保系统

title: 一美国游客在清迈（Chiang Mai）商店涉嫌盗窃被捕
desc_original: American tourist accused of theft at Chiang Mai shop, police called Legacy Police in Chiang Mai were called to a second-hand shop today, March 12, after a report that an American tourist allegedly took items without paying , with CCTV footage later used as evidence. At about 11am, tourist police, immigration police and local patrol officers went to a second-hand clothing and footwear shop in a market area in Wat Ket subdistrict, Mueang Chiang Mai district to investigate. When police arrived, they found the shop owner and the suspect, described as an American tourist, along with items presented
summary_cn: 3月12日上午约11时，清迈（Chiang Mai）警方接报前往瓦格区（Wat Ket）市场调查一宗盗窃案。一名美国游客被指控在二手游乐商店拿走衣物和鞋子后未付钱离店。店主通过监控录像（CCTV）取证并报警。清迈旅游警察、移民局及当地巡警共同介入处理，该游客被当场截获并带回调查。此案件提醒在泰游客法律底线，当地商家对偷盗行为普遍持有零容忍态度并报警处理。
title_cn: 一美国游客在清迈（Chiang Mai）商店涉嫌盗窃被捕

title: 一名印度籍男子被发现死于普吉岛卡利姆海滩（Kalim Beach）
desc_original: Indian man found dead on Kalim Beach in Phuket Legacy An Indian tourist died on Kalim Beach in Phuket this morning, March 12, right after having breakfast. The cause of his mysterious death remains under investigation. A hotel worker found the Indian man, 44 year old Gaurav Sethi, lying face down on the beach outside the accommodation at about 9am. The worker then informed Sethi’s wife, Vartika Bassi, and contacted Patong Police Station to investigate. According to Khao Phuket, Sethi was found near a traffic barrier separating the beach from the road. Police reported no visible injuries or sig
summary_cn: 3月12日上午约9时，一名44岁的印度籍游客Gaurav Sethi被发现面朝下俯卧在普吉岛卡利姆海滩（Kalim Beach）上身亡。据悉，死者在早餐后不久离开酒店前往海滩。一名酒店工作人员发现遗体并紧急联系其妻子及芭东（Patong）警方。警方现场检查未发现明显的外部创伤迹象，死因目前尚不明确。此事件再度引发了关于游客在泰意外安全及突发疾病处理的关注。
title_cn: 一名印度籍男子被发现死于普吉岛卡利姆海滩（Kalim Beach）

title: 德国游客在芭提雅（Pattaya）酒店9楼坠亡，疑因个人财务压力
desc_original: German tourist dies after falling from ninth floor of Pattaya hotel Legacy A German tourist died after falling from a Pattaya hotel late yesterday, March 11, with police suspecting stress linked to personal and financial problems. Police were called to the hotel at 11.36pm after receiving a report that a person had fallen from a height. At the scene, officers found the 38 year old man’s body on the ground beside the building after he reportedly fell from the rooftop on the ninth floor. The area was cordoned off to keep members of the public away while investigations were carried out. During ch
summary_cn: 3月11日深夜，一名38岁的德国籍游客从芭提雅（Pattaya）度假酒店的9楼楼顶坠落身亡。警方于23:36分赶到现场并封锁区域。根据初步调查，警方怀疑其自杀动机与沉重的个人及财务压力有关。此案件凸显了长期旅泰外籍人士的心理健康问题。芭提雅警方正通过使馆联系死者家属，并对该案细节及酒店安保措施进行深入核查。
title_cn: 德国游客在芭提雅（Pattaya）酒店9楼坠亡，疑因个人财务压力

The mother alleged the nursery owner gave her baby me
summary_cn: 曼谷叻布拉那区（Rat Burana）发生一起托儿所命案，5个月大女婴在托管期间不幸夭折，引发其母与园方的剧烈冲突。母亲指控托儿所照顾不周且疑似违规投药，而园方负责人则反驳称是家庭成员喂养软饮料导致婴儿健康受损。由于双方各执一词，目前该母亲已寻求帕维纳妇女儿童基金会（Paveena Foundation）协助维权。此案引发泰国社会对私立托儿所质量及监管漏洞的广泛讨论。

title: 罗勇府（Rayong）食客因炒饭不满大闹餐厅致店员受伤
desc_original: Rayong restaurant rampage over fried rice caught on CCTV Legacy CCTV footage from a restaurant in Rayong has circulated online after it captured a customer damaging property there at 12.33am on March 9, reportedly after complaining about fried rice . The video, first shared by a Facebook user, shows a man wearing a white shirt and a black hat behaving aggressively inside the premises, including kicking a table, smashing glasses and knocking a light bulb. A member of staff was also cut by broken glass during the incident. Yesterday, March 11, a reporter visited the restaurant in Makham Ku subdi
summary_cn: 3月9日凌晨，罗勇府（Rayong）一家餐厅发生暴力事件。一名男食客疑因对炒饭质量表达不满，在店内大肆打砸桌椅、灯泡及玻璃器皿。监控录像显示该男子行为极其暴力，导致一名服务员被碎玻璃割伤。事后店主将视频公开至网络报警并寻求正义。此事件提醒在泰经营者加强安保意识，同时也反映了后疫情时代餐饮消费矛盾激化的局部社会现象。目前警方正根据影像追踪肇事者。
title_cn: 罗勇府（Rayong）食客因炒饭不满大闹餐厅致店员受伤

desc_original: How social media growth tools are transforming digital business in Thailand 2026 Legacy Companies in Thailand are redefining their customer attraction, trust building and revenue generation using social platforms. There has been a change in consumer behaviour whereby people prefer online exploration, word-of-mouth and interaction. With the rising competition, the brands cannot afford to depend on organic posting alone to keep their presence visible. Analytic-driven, automation-driven, audience-targeting growth tools have become the key drivers of success. By the year 2026, businesses will have
title_cn: 2026年社交媒体增长工具将如何重塑泰国数字化商业格局
summary_cn: 随着2026年泰国数字化进程的深入，社交媒体工具正在重新定义传统企业的获客与获利模式。受众消费习惯已转向线上探索及互动，品牌已无法单靠自然流量维持曝光。分析驱动、自动化驱动及精准定向的增长工具已成为成功的核心因素。泰国企业正通过这些工具提升品牌信任度，以应对日益竞争的市场环境，这标志着泰国数字营销步入智能化新阶段。

title_cn: 泰国顺利遣送4万名滞留欧洲游客回国
summary_cn: 因中东局势引发航班中断，此前滞留在泰国的4万多名欧洲游客已通过包机顺利回国。泰国泰国民航局（CAAT）通过特别批准，允许相关国家的旅行社派遣包机接回滞留人员。此举体现了泰国政府在突发国际危机中对旅游业的应急保障能力，缓解了主要口岸的滞留压力。
desc_original: More than 40,000 European tourists stranded here by flight disruptions in the Middle East have safely returned home, aided by the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand's (CAAT) temporary approval for tour operators in the originating countries to send charter flights to retrieve them.

title_cn: 泰国家居建筑商 Built To Build 宣布油价上涨期间不加价
summary_cn: 尽管中东冲突导致全球油价飙升且建筑成本压力增大，泰国知名家居建筑商 Built To Build Group 承诺对已签约客户冻结价格。公司负责人表示，由于信心冲突会在本月底平息，现阶段将自行消化成本波动。此举旨在稳定市场信心，对于正处于合同执行期的业主属于重大利好。
desc_original: Homebuilder Built To Build Group says it will freeze prices for contracted clients despite rising oil prices fuelled by war in the Middle East, expressing confidence the conflict will subside by the end of this month.

title_cn: 泰国购房者受促在上半年内决策以应对通胀
summary_cn: 泰国多家银行近日向潜在购房者发出提醒，建议在今年上半年内尽快做出购房决定。由于正值战争期间，通货膨胀预期加剧，预计未来建筑材料及融资成本将进一步攀升。在泰持有购房计划的人士需关注贷款利率调整及房企调价预期，以捕捉当前相对较低的成本窗口期。
desc_original: Banks are urging prospective homebuyers to make purchasing decisions within the first half of the year before costs rise further, amid concerns that inflation could increase under wartime conditions.

title_cn: 面临美国关税挑战，泰国电子产业寻求多元化转型
summary_cn: 泰国支柱出口产业——电子行业正面临美国关税壁垒与泰铢汇率波动的双重打击。行业高管指出，通过投资人工智能（AI）及数据中心相关产品实现多元化是缓冲冲击的关键。尽管出口环境严峻，但市场对AI硬件与算力基础设施的强劲需求正成为支撑泰国电子行业收入增长的新引擎。
desc_original: As US tariffs and baht fluctuation pose challenges for the electronics industry, Thailand's major export earner, executives see investment and product diversification as key to cushion the impact, while demand for artificial intelligence (AI) and data centres continues to drive revenue growth.

title_cn: 中东战争波及石油供应，泰国面临塑料短缺风险
summary_cn: 受中东地区持续冲突影响，全球原油供应受阻，泰国企业正高度警惕由此引发的塑料原材料短缺。由于石油是塑料生产的核心上游原料，供应链中段企业已开始评估产能调整，未来可能导致本地塑料制成品的物价上涨及包装、物流等相关产业的成本波动。
desc_original: Businesses are bracing for the impact of a plastic supply shortage due to ongoing conflicts in the Middle East.

title: 拟议“旅行规则”引起数字资产行业担忧
title_cn: 拟议“旅行规则”（Travel Rule）引起泰国数字资产行业担忧
summary_cn: 泰国数字资产经营者发出警告，称新拟议的“旅行规则”（Travel Rule）不应过于严格，否则可能无意中破坏区块链网络的开放性和去中心化本质。业内人士担心，过度的监管限制将窒息该领域的创新能力，呼吁在合规与行业良性发展之间取得平衡。
desc: Digital asset business operators are warning the newly proposed Travel Rule should not be overly restrictive or it could unintentionally undermine the open and decentralised nature of blockchain networks, stifling innovation.
desc_original: Digital asset business operators are warning the newly proposed Travel Rule should not be overly restrictive or it could unintentionally undermine the open and decentralised nature of blockchain networks, stifling innovation.

title: 回国泰商为在伊朗立场辩护
title_cn: 从伊朗撤离泰人抵泰，辩护称当地环境基本安全
summary_cn: 52名从伊朗（Iran）撤离的泰国公民于周一抵达素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi Airport）。尽管中东冲突持续，但多名回国人员表示由于生活圈层稳定，伊朗境内大部分地区依然相对安全。此番表态是对近期担忧在伊公民安全舆论的回应。
desc: Fifty-two Thai nationals evacuated from Iran arrived at Suvarnabhumi airport on Monday, with several saying the country remained largely safe despite the Middle East conflict.
desc_original: Fifty-two Thai nationals evacuated from Iran arrived at Suvarnabhumi airport on Monday, with several saying the country remained largely safe despite the Middle East conflict.
location_detail: 素万那普机场 Suvarnabhumi Airport

title: 商业发展厅点名6家涉嫌代持的椰子企业
title_cn: 泰国商业发展厅（DBD）调查椰子产业，6家涉外企代持公司被点名
summary_cn: 泰国商业发展厅（DBD）近日点名了6家涉嫌利用泰国代理人（Nominee）非法经营的外国控股椰子企业。当局目前正准备修订相关法律以堵住监管漏洞，严厉打击外资通过代持手段绕过官方限制进入泰国本土保护性产业的行为。
desc: Authorities have named six firms suspected of running foreign-controlled coconut businesses through Thai nominees, while preparing legal amendments to close regulatory loopholes.
desc_original: Authorities have named six firms suspected of running foreign-controlled coconut businesses through Thai nominees, while preparing legal amendments to close regulatory loopholes.

title: 物价上涨引发民众担忧
title_cn: 物价持续攀升引发泰国全国消费者忧虑
summary_cn: 受中东战争导致的全球能源价格上涨和供应链受阻影响，泰国全国范围内的消费者对日益增长的生活成本感到担忧。日常必需品价格水涨船高，直接影响了泰国民众的购买力和基本生活质量，公众呼吁政府采取更有效的控价措施。
desc: Consumers across the country are worried about the rising cost of goods as global energy prices and supply chains have been hit by the war in the Middle East, pushing up prices for everyday necessities.
desc_original: Consumers across the country are worried about the rising cost of goods as global energy prices and supply chains have been hit by the war in the Middle East, pushing up prices for everyday necessities.

title: 燃油基金每日补贴达10亿铢
title_cn: 燃油基金每日耗费10亿泰铢补贴，泰国政府努力限制燃料需求
summary_cn: 随着全球能源成本飙升，泰国政府正加大力度抑制燃料需求。目前，为了将国内柴油价格维持在人为的低水平，泰国燃油基金目前每天耗费约10亿泰铢进行补贴，这种巨大的财务压力正迫使内阁重新审视补贴政策的可持续性。
desc: The Thai government is widening efforts to curb demand for fuel, as it burns through cash fighting to keep domestic diesel prices artificially low amid surging global energy costs.
desc_original: The Thai government is widening efforts to curb demand for fuel, as it burns through cash fighting to keep domestic diesel prices artificially low amid surging global energy costs.

BANGKOK, Thailand – The Royal Thai Embassy in Doha has issued an updated advisory outlining key developments and safety guidance for Thai nationals in Qatar. The embassy reports that the Government of Qatar confirms that authorities are maintaining effective control nationwide. Thai nationals are advised to remain calm, stay alert, and strictly
summary_cn: 泰国驻卡塔尔多哈 (Doha) 大使馆发布紧急安全预警，提醒在卡塔尔的泰国国民鉴于当前领空部分关闭的情况，务必保持冷静并严格遵守政府指令。由于地区局势发展导致航班波动，卡塔尔航空目前已恢复有限航班，其中包括从多哈飞往曼谷的 QR826 航班，以协助滞留旅客撤离或回国。大使馆强调将密切关注局势，确保在卡塔尔泰国公民的安全。

desc_original: The Thai Cabinet has approved the renewal of a bilateral LNG cooperation agreement with Japan, allowing the Ministry of Energy of Thailand to sign the consent document during the Indo-Pacific Energy Security Ministerial and Business Forum in Tokyo, reinforcing long-term energy security cooperation between the two countries. BANGKOK, Thailand – The Cabinet has approved the renewal of the bilateral cooperation agreement between Thailand and Japan on Liquefied Natural Gas (LNG) to strengthen long-term energy security for both countries. During the meeting on March 10, 2026, the cabinet approved t
summary_cn: 泰国政府内阁于2026年3月10日正式批准续签与日本的液化天然气 (LNG) 双边合作协议。泰国能源部将在东京举行的印太能源安全部长级论坛期间签署相关文件。此举旨在加强两国在液化天然气供应链领域的长期深度合作，通过资源共享与技术交流，共同应对复杂国际局势下的能源保障压力，提升泰国的液化天然气进口稳定性与能源安全储备水平。

summary_cn: 伊美战争进入第12天，面对全球市场的动荡和民调下滑，美国总统特朗普一面宣称正在取得胜利，一面在终战立场上反复摇摆。从最初要求伊朗“无条件投降”，到后来暗示接受更换领导层，其模糊的态度加剧了中东局势的不确定性。这场冲突已对全球经济产生震荡，由于双方均无退让迹象，局势正朝着不可预测的方向发展，严重影响中东出口与供应链。

summary_cn: 3月11日，一架从海德拉巴飞往普吉（Phuket）的印度航空快运（Air India Express）IX938航班在普吉国际机场降落时发生硬着陆。机上载有133名乘客，所幸无人受伤。此次事故导致飞机滞留在跑道上无法移动，严重干扰了机场的正常运行。旅游警察于上午11时20分接到报案。初步检查显示飞机降落时鼻轮发生故障，目前相关部门正在全力排查并恢复跑道运营。
location_detail: 普吉国际机场 Phuket International Airport

desc_original: Bangkok delivery rider caught on CCTV filming under skirt of vendor Legacy A Thai delivery rider allegedly filmed under a skirt of a female vendor while waiting for an order at a beverage shop in Bangkok . The vendor posted the video on social media to warn others, saying the incident happened at about 1pm on March 7. The footage showed a rider wearing a green jacket standing behind her as she prepared drinks. The suspect was then seen approaching the vendor and sitting down. The vendor alleged he took a photo under her skirt before stepping back and checking the images on his phone. He was al
summary_cn: 近日，曼谷（Bangkok）一名女性饮品摊主在社交媒体上发布监控视频提醒他人。视频显示，3月7日下午1时许，一名身穿绿色外套的外卖配送员在等待取餐时，站在摊主身后并在其准备饮料时实施纠缠。随后该男子坐下并疑似从低角度偷拍女摊主的裙底，之后还退后查看手机照片。受害者随后查看监控并确认其猥亵行为。此事件引发了当地对公共安全及外卖从业人员管理的关注。
title_cn: 曼谷一外卖配送员在饮料店偷拍女摊主裙底被监控抓获

title: 关于考生进入考场前“丢弃现金”的网络传导图片被证实为不实信息
desc_original: Photos of students discarding cash outside exam rooms debunked Legacy The viral images shared as proof that students discarded cash during the Triam Udom Suksa School entrance exam were challenged yesterday , March 10, after a clarification said the photo was not from the exam venue. The controversy relates to the Triam Udom Suksa School entrance exam for Matthayom 4 (Grade 10), at Impact Mueang Thong Thani, where candidates were not allowed to bring money into the exam room. This led to online claims that candidates were forced to throw cash into bins or leave it on the floor outside. Photo v
summary_cn: 近日一组传言称Triam Udom Suksa学校入学考试期间，考生因不准携带现金进入考场而被迫将钱丢入垃圾桶或弃之于地的照片引发热议。3月10日相关机构澄清，该照片拍摄地点并非考场所在地Impact Mueang Thong Thani（曼通塔尼会展中心）。虽然该校的高一（Matthayom 4）入学考确实有严格的安全规定，但网传的极端弃钱行为已被证实为张冠李戴的不实传闻。

title: 泰国环保署表示曼谷最严重PM2.5雾霾危机期已过
desc_original: BANGKOK — 11 March 2026, Thailand’s Pollution Control Department says Bangkok has passed the worst of its PM2.5 pollution crisis, with air quality improving overall compared with last year, though occasional spikes above safety standards are still possible during the seasonal transition. Pollution Control Department director-general Surin Warakitthamrong said on Wednesday that air quality in the capital has begun to ease after a severe pollution period earlier in the season. He said the situation has improved compared with the previous year, following intensified measures by government agencie
summary_cn: 泰国污染控制司（Pollution Control Department）表示，曼谷（Bangkok）最严重的PM2.5雾霾危机阶段已经过去。司长Surin Warakitthamrong指出，尽管在季节交替期间仍可能出现短暂的超标情况，但当前空气质量整体已较去年同期有所改善。政府通过强化管控措施，使得首都地区的空气污染压力开始缓解。这对于当地居民及游客来说是一个积极信号，表明最艰难的污染高峰已经平稳度过。
title_cn: 泰国环保署表示曼谷最严重PM2.5雾霾危机期已过

title: 男子将爱车借放给女性朋友，归还时发现车内血迹斑斑
desc_original: Thai man finds bloodstains in his car after lending it to friend Legacy A Thai man asked police to investigate after finding bloodstains , a military ID card and an obscured registration plate on his car after he lent it to a female friend . The 29 year old owner, Thanaporn Wilaepana, contacted Pak Kret Police to inspect his bronze Honda City sedan, which was parked outside a condominium in the Khlong Klua area of Nonthaburi province. Police said an initial inspection found damage to the front and rear bumpers, a right rear door that could not be opened and signs of a crash at several points o
summary_cn: 一名29岁的男子Thanaporn向暖武里府（Nonthaburi）北革（Pak Kret）警方报案，称其将本田轿车借给一位女性朋友后，在车内发现不明血迹、一张军人身份证以及一块被遮挡的号牌。车身前后保险杠受损严重，右后车门无法开启，有多处撞击痕迹。该车当时停放在Khlong Klua区某公寓外。目前警方已介入调查，以确定该车辆是否涉及重大交通事故或刑事案件。

desc_original: Private Airport to City Transfer : Suvarnabhumi (BKK)/Don Mueang ... ... The SIAM Songkran Music Festival 2026 is the premier way to experience the Songkran Festival 2026 in Bangkok.
summary_cn: 2026年宋干节（Songkran，泼水节）官方指南发布。文中重点提及曼谷素万那普机场（Suvarnabhumi）和廊曼机场（Don Mueang）的接送便利。今年曼谷的核心亮点是SIAM宋干音乐节，结合了传统泼水庆典与现代电子音乐，是国际游客体验泰国新年气氛的首选项目。建议出行人员提前规划机场转运行程。

title_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节 Songkran 官方日期公布：4月13日至15日迎新年
desc_original: Songkran Thailand 2026 is officially happening from Monday, April 13 to Wednesday, April 15, kicking off the traditional Thai New Year. While the official holiday is just three days, don’t be surprised if the water fights start early or go ...
summary_cn: 泰国官方确认，2026年宋干节（泼水节）法定假日定于4月13日（周一）至4月15日（周三）。作为泰国传统新年，虽然官方假期只有三天，但部分热门地区通常会提前开启庆祝活动或延长狂欢。提醒游客在此时段出行需留意交通封锁情况，并注意保护电子设备等易受水损物品。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 泰全国宋干节庆祝时长各有不同：曼谷、清迈及芭提雅泼水期或长达一周
desc_original: Songkran officially takes place from 13 to 15 April 2026, though celebrations often extend beyond these dates, especially in major cities and tourist hotspots. In cities like Bangkok, Chiang Mai, and Pattaya, festivities can last up to a week, ...
summary_cn: 尽管2026年宋干节法定假期为4月13日至15日，但在曼谷（Bangkok）、清迈（Chiang Mai）及芭提雅（Pattaya）等旅游热点城市，庆典活动往往会延长。在清迈等地，泼水狂欢有时会持续长达一周。前往清迈古城区或芭提雅海滨的游客需提前预订酒店，并做好面对交通拥堵的准备。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title_cn: 曼谷 2026 宋干节泼水庆典：传统仪式与泼水大战的交响曲
desc_original: Known as the Thai New Year, Songkran is celebrated with water fights, traditional rituals, and a joyful atmosphere. Bangkok has become the heart of the festivities, attracting visitors from around the world.
summary_cn: 曼谷（Bangkok）已成为泰国宋干节庆祝活动的核心阵地。2026年的活动将融合传统佛教祈福仪式与现代激烈的街道泼水战。曼谷素坤逸路（Sukhumvit）及考山路（Khaosan Road）等片区将有高浓度的庆典气氛，吸引全球游客。对于追求传统文化的游客，建议前往大皇宫附近的寺庙观礼。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel

title: 2026年宋干节攻略：芭提雅（Pattaya）庆祝时间延长至4月19日
desc_original: Notice that Songkran 2026 Pattaya dates fall on April 17-19, extending celebrations beyond the traditional period. Cities coordinate schedules, allowing serial festival-hoppers to experience multiple locations across eight continuous days.
summary_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节（Songkran）将采取多地城市联动模式，庆祝活动预计可持续8天。其中，芭提雅（Pattaya）的庆祝活动定于4月17日至19日举行，比传统日期有所延长。此举旨在方便游客在不同城市间穿梭，体验多场连续的大型泼水活动。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel
title_cn: 2026年宋干节攻略：芭提雅（Pattaya）庆祝时间延长至4月19日

title: 泰国2026宋干节注入新活力：清迈（Chiang Mai）、普吉（Phuket）等目的地受瞩目
desc_original: Thailand’s Songkran 2026 is set to bring new energy to top destinations like Pattaya, Chiang Mai, Phuket, Krabi, and Koh Samui, elevating them as prime locations for unforgettable water fights, scenic beauty, and cultural immersion. With its extended festivities and growing global appeal, Songkran continues to captivate both domestic and international travelers, making it the ultimate travel experience of the year.
summary_cn: 2026年泰国宋干节（Songkran）将为清迈（Chiang Mai）、普吉（Phuket）、甲米（Krabi）及苏梅岛（Koh Samui）等热门旅游地注入强劲发展动力。通过延长节庆时间和深挖文化内涵，泰国旨在将泼水节打造为集文化沉浸、美景欣赏于一体的全球顶尖旅游体验，预计将显著拉动国内外游客增长。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel
title_cn: 泰国2026宋干节注入新活力：清迈（Chiang Mai）、普吉（Phuket）等目的地受瞩目

title: 泰国超越东亚多国，成为2026年全球最佳宋干节旅游目的地
desc_original: Pattaya leads the list of domestic destinations, primarily due to its extended celebrations. The city’s festival continues well beyond the traditional Songkran dates, lasting until April 19.
summary_cn: 在2026年全球文化庆典目的地竞争中，泰国力压中国、日本、韩国等国，成为游客首选。由于芭提雅（Pattaya）的宋干节（Songkran）庆祝活动将一直延续至4月19日，该市目前位居泰国国内旅游目的地榜首，成功吸引了大量国际长途游客关注。
source: Thailand fireworks Songkran New Year cel
title_cn: 泰国超越东亚多国，成为2026年全球最佳宋干节旅游目的地

title_cn: 美国打击伊朗水雷船 战争扰乱石油市场
desc_original: TEHRAN - The United States said Tuesday it was striking Iranian ships capable of mining the crucial Strait of Hormuz and threatened escalation if Tehran presses ahead, as the Middle East war wreaks havoc on global oil markets.
summary_cn: 美国周二表示正在打击伊朗具有布雷能力的船只，并威胁如果伊朗继续前进将升级行动。中东冲突导致全球油市波动加剧，油价大幅上升。

title_cn: Sansiri表示对全球动荡保持信心
desc_original: Construction costs for housing and condo projects already launched remain largely unaffected by global uncertainties, although a prolonged rise in oil prices could push up building costs for new developments, says SET-listed developer Sansiri.
summary_cn: 上市房地产开发商尚思瑞表示，已启动的住房和公寓项目建筑成本基本不受全球不确定性影响，但油价持续上升可能推高新项目建筑成本。

title_cn: 银行加强数字监控 打击人头账户
desc_original: Banks are tightening monitoring of digital transactions to prevent the use of mule accounts, as fraudsters shift their activities after stricter controls were imposed on conventional bank accounts.
summary_cn: 泰国银行加强数字交易监控，以防止骗子账户被使用。诈骗者在传统账户受到更严格控制后转向数字渠道进行非法活动。

title_cn: 地缘政治风险笼罩股市前景
desc_original: Escalating tensions between Iran, the US and Israel could trigger a major military confrontation within 3-4 months, potentially driving crude oil prices as high as US$135 per barrel in a worst-case scenario, pundits warn.
summary_cn: 伊朗、美国和以色列之间的紧张局势可能在3-4个月内引发重大军事对抗，在最坏情况下可能将原油价格推高至每桶135美元。

title_cn: 昆拉武特重返世界第一
desc_original: Kunlavut Vitidsarn was officially confirmed as world No.1 after the latest world rankings were announced by the Badminton World Federation (BWF) on Tuesday.
summary_cn: 泰国羽毛球选手昆拉武特·维迪沙恩在羽毛球世界联合会最新发布的世界排名中被确认为世界排名第一。

title_cn: 政府禁止新柬埔劳入境
desc_original: The government has reaffirmed that no new Cambodian migrant workers will be allowed into the country due to security concerns, despite pressure from the private sector.
summary_cn: 泰国政府重申，由于安全顾虑，不允许新的柬埔寨移工进入该国，尽管私营部门施压要求放宽限制。

title_cn: 新政府须主导边界谈判
desc_original: Foreign Minister Sihasak Phuangketkeow said Cambodia's proposal to convene a meeting of the Thai–Cambodian Joint Boundary Commission (JBC) to discuss territorial demarcation must wait until a new government assumes office.
summary_cn: 泰国外交部长西哈萨克表示，柬埔寨提议召开泰柬联合边界委员会会议讨论领土划分一事必须等待新政府上台。

title_cn: Summer storms forecast to reach Pattaya as Thailand braces for unstable weather

(Photo by Jetsada Homklin) PATTAYA, Thailand – The Thai Meteorological Department (TMD) has issued a warning of summer storms expected to affect large parts of Thailand from March 11 to 13, with unstable weather conditions likely to reach Pattaya and surrounding areas later in the period. According to the forecast, the storm
summary_cn: 泰国气象部门警告3月11-13日夏季风暴将影响泰国大部分地区。风暴系统3月11日从泰国北部开始，之后向南扩展，预计将在该时期稍后到达芭提雅及周边地区。

title_cn: Extreme heat ‘making life increasingly unliveable’
desc_original: The number of days when extreme heat makes it too dangerously hot to walk the dog, sweep the porch and engage in other ordinary pursuits has doubled around the world over the past 75 years, according to new research.

summary_cn: 随着中东地缘政治冲突加剧，泰国旅游业预计将迎来大量寻求避风港的外国人，类似于俄乌战争期间的涌入。2024年俄罗斯入境人数曾飙升至174万，对旅游城市的房地产市场产生重大影响。目前泰国被视为区域避风港，预计将再次吸引避险人群。这对关注泰国房产和长期居留政策的投资者是重要信号。
title_cn: 旅游业严阵以待：中东冲突或引发赴泰“避难”潮 (Tourism braces for impact of Mideast war)

desc_original: Thai energy authorities are preparing to secure loans from commercial banks to shore up the Oil Fuel Fund, which is rapidly running dry as global crude prices surge past US$100 per barrel amid the escalating US-Iran conflict.
summary_cn: 受美伊冲突升级影响，全球原油价格已突破每桶100美元。泰国燃油基金正迅速耗尽，能源部门计划向商业银行贷款以填补缺口并维持燃油价格补贴。内阁预计周二批准短期和中期能源管理措施。油价上涨将直接推高泰国国内通胀和生活成本，是目前宏观经济的核心变量。
title_cn: 油价突破100美元：泰国动用贷款维持燃油基金 (State steps in as oil rockets to $100)

title: Govt moves to curb fuel prices
title_cn: 政府采取措施抑制燃油价格
desc_original: The cabinet is expected to approve a series of short- and medium-term energy management measures on Tuesday to cope with surging global energy prices driven by the conflict in the Middle East.
summary_cn: 内阁预计将于周二批准一系列短期和中长期能源管理措施，以应对中东冲突导致的全球能源价格上涨。

title: Thai Regulator Eases Rules for Evacuation Flights
title_cn: 泰国监管机构放松撤离航班规定
desc_original: BANGKOK — 9 March 2026, Thailand's civil aviation regulator has eased rules to allow additional evacuation flights amid conflict in the Middle East, prioritising humanitarian needs for passengers stranded abroad. Air Chief Marshal Manat Chavanaprayoon, director of the Civil Aviation Authority of Thailand (CAAT), said on Monday that under normal circumstances flight approvals must follow each country's standard procedures. However, during war or emergencies, authorities often need greater flexibility and cooperation, particularly for flights arranged to repatriate citizens or passengers back to
summary_cn: 泰国航空监管机构放宽规定，允许在中东冲突期间增加撤离航班，优先考虑被困海外乘客的人道主义需求。CAAT 表示将提供更大灵活性。

title: First group of 62 Thai nationals arrives safely in Turkey from Iran
title_cn: 首批62名泰国公民经土耳其安全撤离
desc_original: First group of 62 Thai nationals arrives safely in Turkey from Iran Legacy A group of 62 Thai nationals has crossed from Iran into Turkey as part of a Royal Thai Government evacuation effort linked to an ongoing conflict in the Middle East, with onward travel to Thailand planned over March 8 and today, March 9. Officials at the Kapıköy border checkpoint received the first group on the evening of March 7 at 6.40pm local time. The reception was coordinated with the Department of Consular Affairs and representatives from the Royal Thai Embassy in Ankara. Photo via MFA Border staff at Kapıköy faci
summary_cn: 作为泰国政府撤离行动的一部分，62名泰国公民从伊朗进入土耳其，计划于3月8-9日返回泰国。

desc_original: The Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) has expressed confidence that foreign investors will return to Thai equities once geopolitical tensions subside, noting that Thailand could serve as a regional safe haven and that the bourse has robust mechanisms to manage volatility during periods of crisis.
summary_cn: 泰国证券交易所（SET）表示，一旦地缘政治紧张局势缓解，外资将重返泰国股市。SET认为泰国具有区域避风港潜力，且交易所拥有健全的机制来管理危机期间的波动。在当前全球股市动荡背景下，SET试图稳固投资者信心，强调泰国的避险价值。
title_cn: 交易所看好外资归来：泰国股市被视为避风港 (Thai bourse buoyant on return of foreign investors)

desc_original: Two arrested after luxury watches stolen in Pattaya home break-in. 26 year old Kritsaphong and 28 year old Nakarin, were linked to a burglary at a luxury home in the Phra Tamnak area, where two intruders allegedly climbed a wall to enter the property. Luxury watches worth more than 6.4 million baht reported stolen.

summary_cn: 中央调查局（CIB）搜查北革府兰鲁卡县一个仓库，逮捕两名嫌疑人，查获干燥壁虎尸体和受保护木材，可能与国际走私网络有关。

Samorn also told the officer he planned to commit suicide , prompting police to send additional support to the location, a room in Phasi Charoen district. Armed officers from Bang Khun Thian Police Station went to a rented room in Soi Thoet Thai 82, Phasi Charo
summary_cn: 曼谷一名58岁男子因前妻拒绝与其发生性关系，在出租屋内将其刺死。嫌疑人随后联系担任警察的朋友自首，并表示计划自杀。

desc_original: Tak — Gas stations in several border districts of Tak province have begun restricting fuel sales, banning vehicles from Myanmar while limiting Thai-registered cars to purchases of no more than 1,000 baht due to surge of vehicles crossing from Myawaddy.
summary_cn: 因中东局势导致能源供应担忧，大量车辆从缅甸妙瓦底涌入泰国达府（Tak）加油。目前达府五个边境地区的加油站已开始限制燃油销售：禁止缅甸牌照车辆加油，泰国牌照车辆每车限购1000泰铢。这一现象也反映出泰国燃油价格补贴在邻国对比下的价格优势及供应紧张态势。
title_cn: 达府加油站限制销售：禁缅甸车加油，泰国车限1000铢 (Border gas stations in Tak ban Myanmar vehicles, limit Thai cars to 1,000 baht)

summary_cn: 一名泰国整形外科医生为手术后果进行辩护，此前患者家人投诉称一男子在鼻部和下巴整形手术后昏迷四天且情况恶化。患者家人支付48万铢手术费。

Srisupha Kesavapitak, known as 'Beijing', enrolled at Ramkhamhaeng University in 2020 at the age of 13 after passing the IGCSE equivalency exam. summary_cn: 一名泰国青少年在16岁时以二等荣誉学位毕业，同时花滑成绩斐然。Srisupha Kesavapitak 2020年13岁时通过IGCSE考试进入兰甘亨大学。

The worker of Utopia bar in Soi Pattaya 6 filed a complaint with Mueang Pattaya Police Station and provided CCTV footage as evidence. The suspect's nationality has not been confirmed. In the video, the suspect was seen wearing a black jacket, black cap, beige shorts and white train
summary_cn: 芭提雅一家酒吧的员工报告称，昨晚8点左右，一名外籍男子在收银台偷走一名泰国员工的手机。受害者担心手机中的图像和个人信息被泄露滥用。

It's behaviour like this that gives all Brits abroad a bad name.' In the video, the foreign man, reported to be a British national, forced the officer to the floor and punched him
summary_cn: 网上视频显示一名英国男子在便利店内攻击一名泰国警察，随后被警察和店员制服。视频显示该外籍男子将警察推倒并拳击。

Fire engines from the local area were dispatched after the report of a house fire in the subdistrict. summary_cn: 武里南府 Hin Khon 村一栋两层住宅发生火灾，消防部门怀疑是充电宝爆炸所致。消防车赶到前火势已蔓延。

title_cn: 战火冲击波：中东局势下泰国能源与供应链的多重压力与应对
desc_original: The escalating conflict in the Middle East, particularly the looming threat of a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, is casting a long shadow over the economy.
summary_cn: 中东冲突持续升级，霍尔木兹海峡（Strait of Hormuz）被封锁的威胁日益逼近，泰国经济面临严峻考验。作为石油进口依赖型经济体，泰国在能源供应安全、原材料成本上涨和供应链稳定等多个层面承受压力，政府和企业正积极研究应对替代方案，全面评估冲击规模。

title_cn: 🔄 泰国启动从伊朗撤离行动，首批公民已开始离境（3月8日更新）
desc_original: Thailand has begun evacuating its first group of nationals from Iran, relocating diplomatic operations to eastern Turkey to support the repatriation effort.

title_cn: 大选后续：最高行政法院仍在审查18起选举及公投相关案件
desc_original: The Supreme Administrative Court is reviewing 18 cases related to the recent election and referendum, with one case already dismissed, two rejected, and one withdrawn, says Prawit Boonthiem, vice president of the court.
summary_cn: 最高行政法院（Supreme Administrative Court）副院长巴威·汶提姆（Prawit Boonthiem）表示，法院目前仍在审查与近期大选及公投相关的18起案件，其中1起已被撤销、2起被驳回、1起由申请方主动撤回，其余案件仍在程序推进中，选后法律争议清理工作持续进行。

title_cn: 中东紧张局势推高泰国化肥价格，孔敬（Khon Kaen）调查显示尿素（Urea）零售价大幅上涨

title_cn: 全球硬件价格剧烈波动令泰国IT采购陷入困境：服务器采购无法做计划，市场波动创近年新高
desc_original: Purchasing IT equipment, particularly servers, has become significantly more difficult due to market volatility, said a veteran IT executive who requested anonymity.
summary_cn: 一位不愿具名的资深IT高管指出，受全球市场剧烈波动影响，泰国企业在采购IT设备（尤其是服务器）方面面临前所未有的困难。价格波动幅度已超过近年历史水平，令企业采购计划难以制定，成本核算存在较大不确定性，数字化转型和基础设施升级项目进度受到制约。

title_cn: 泰国家庭在上海酒店惊遇男员工藏身床底，TikTok视频引发国际广泛关注
desc_original: Thai family reports Shanghai hotel staff who sneaks into their room Legacy A Thai family is pursuing legal action against a hotel in Shanghai after they said they found a male staff member sneaking into their room and later claiming he entered by mistake. A Thai woman, Yatida Siriwangchai, posted videos of the incident on her TikTok account, @tyatida , on Tuesday, March 3. In the clips, a man is seen lying in a narrow gap between her father’s bed and the wall, appearing to hide. Yatida asked how
summary_cn: 泰国女性雅提达（Yatida Siriwangchai）于3月3日在TikTok（账号@tyatida）发布视频，记录了一名上海酒店男性员工藏身其父亲床底的经过，视频中当事人被发现时正躲在床与墙壁之间的狭缝中。该员工事后声称系误入房间。雅提达家庭已启动法律程序向酒店追责，视频在国际社交平台引发大量关注。

title_cn: 芭提雅市政收回Soi 5 Thanwa遭侵占公共用地，路面拓宽工程启动以缓解交通压力
desc_original: Poramet Ngampichet and Manot Nongyai inspect the reclaimed public land at Soi 5 Thanwa as Pattaya moves forward with plans to widen the roadway. PATTAYA, Thailand – Poramet Ngampichet, Mayor of Pattaya, accompanied by Deputy Mayor Manot Nongyai and the mayor’s secretariat team, inspected progress on reclaiming public land along Soi 5 Thanwa, On March 4. Officials from the city’s Engineering Department were also present to provide technical details. Mayor Poramet revealed that the visit focused o
summary_cn: 芭提雅市长颇拉梅（Poramet Ngampichet）与副市长马诺（Manot Nongyai）于3月4日亲赴Soi 5 Thanwa（他纳5巷）视察公共用地收回进展。相关土地此前遭到侵占，市政府已启动路面拓宽工程，旨在缓解该路段长期存在的交通拥堵问题，市政工程部门官员同步提供技术支持。

title_cn: 春武里（Chonburi）女子情侣争吵后坐守路口脱鞋乱砸，拦截车辆视频病毒传播引公路安全热议
desc_original: BANGKOK — A video showing a young woman sitting in the middle of a busy intersection in Chonburi has gone viral, alarming motorists and prompting debate online over road safety. The clip, posted on 5 March by the Facebook page, shows the woman seated on the roadway at the Kiri–Ang Sila traffic lights in Muang district, Chonburi province, as vehicles continued moving through the junction. The caption read: “If you’re going to sulk, at least pick a safe place. It’s dangerous.” In the footage, the
summary_cn: 一段视频在网络爆红：一名年轻女子在春武里府（Chonburi）基里-昂西拉（Kiri-Ang Sila）路口正中央静坐，疑因与男友争吵后一时冲动，脱鞋乱砸并拦截过往车辆。视频引发大量网友就道路安全及情绪管理展开激烈讨论，有人呼吁警方加强对危险行为的执法力度。

title_cn: 恰青沙奥（Chachoengsao）凌晨大麻醉汉持续威胁路人讨烟，警民合力将其制伏拘捕
desc_original: Man high on cannabis threatens and demands cigarettes, gets beaten Legacy Police were called to a roadside stall in Bang Pakong district, Chachoengsao, earlier today, March 5, after a man allegedly threatened people while going around asking for cigarettes . He was later tracked down and restrained by a group of youths. At 4am, officers from Bang Pakong Police Station received a report that a man was threatening to harm people at a roadside shack in Bang Samak Subdistrict, Bang Pakong District.
summary_cn: 3月5日凌晨4时，差春骚府（Chachoengsao）邦巴功区（Bang Pakong）警方接报，一名男子疑似在大麻（Cannabis）影响下四处威胁路人讨要香烟，令周边居民感到恐慌。嫌疑人随后被当地一群年轻人合力制伏后遭警方拘捕，此案引发社区对大麻滥用问题的再度关注。

title_cn: 🔄 新国会开幕倒计时启动：选委会正式认证2月8日大选结果

desc_original: The war-induced sell-off in global stocks continued on Wednesday, with the Stock Exchange of Thailand (SET) having to halt trading at one point to allow nervous investors to take a breather.

desc_original: TEHRAN - Iran’s Revolutionary Guards said on Wednesday they had total control of the Strait of Hormuz, a key waterway for global energy transit, as Israel launched a new wave of strikes on the Iranian capital.

desc_original: Fears of a prolonged Middle East conflict disrupting global energy supplies are rippling across Thailand, triggering price anxieties, panic buying and warnings of logistical strain.

BANGKOK, Thailand – Thailand’s Labor Ministry is preparing to evacuate the first group of Thai workers from the Middle East on March 7 following regional unrest, Labor Minister Treenuch Thienthong said on Wednesday. Narongpol Prabhanirin, acting director of the Real Estate Information Center (REIC), said foreign condominium transfers in the fourth quarter of 2025 totaled 3,888 units, up 1.1% quarter on quarter and 9.3% year on year. title_cn: 泰国舞蹈演员及女友被骗至邻国电话诈骗园区，家人报警失联
desc_original: Thai dancer and girlfriend deceived into working for a call centre scam gang Legacy A Thai male dancer and his girlfriend have been out of contact with their families since February 24, and were later found being deceived into working for a call centre scam gang in a neighbouring country. A complaint was filed after 65 year old Suthep Phueanpharam reported the disappearance of his nephew, 25 year old Pongsakorn “Aon” Phueanpharam, and Aon’s girlfriend, 23 year old Panadda “Dream” Chokeboonrueang

title_cn: 伊朗驻泰大使在曼谷召开发布会，谴责美以"丛林法则"侵略行径违反国际法
desc_original: BANGKOK — Iran’s Ambassador to Thailand, Nassereddin Heidari, on Wednesday denounced what he described as “unprovoked and unjustified acts of aggression” by the United States and Israel against Iran, calling the situation a dangerous escalation. Speaking at a press conference in Bangkok, Heidari said the alleged attacks constituted “a direct assault on the very core principles of international law,” including the prohibition on the use of force and respect for sovereign equality. “This cowardly
summary_cn: 伊朗驻泰大使纳赛尔丁·海达里（Nassereddin Heidari）在曼谷召开新闻发布会，谴责美国和以色列对伊朗发动的袭击属于「无端且不正当的侵略行为」，严重违反国际法中禁止使用武力和尊重国家主权平等的核心原则。他将此次冲突定性为危险升级，并警告国际社会对「丛林法则」蔓延保持高度警觉。

title_cn: 🔄 普吉岛（Phuket）加油站排长龙：中东局势引发油价上涨恐慌，车主大量囤油
desc_original: Phuket drivers rush to fill tanks as fears of a fuel price rise spread Legacy Phuket motorists rushed to refuel yesterday evening, March 3, with long queues forming at a Bangchak petrol station in Kathu as concerns grew that fuel costs could rise amid uncertainty in the Middle East. Vans and taxis running main routes such as Kathu to Patong were among those filling up, along with riders and other residents. The queue reportedly stretched beyond the forecourt and out towards the station entrance.
summary_cn: 3月3日傍晚，普吉岛卡图区（Kathu）邦查克（Bangchak）加油站出现大规模排队，当地车主、面包车和出租摩托司机纷纷抢先加满油箱，原因是中东局势不明朗引发对燃油涨价的普遍担忧，排队车辆一度延伸至加油站出入口外。类似情况在普吉岛多处加油站同步出现。

title_cn: 泰铢（Baht）承压：中东油价飙升和全球避险情绪令泰铢面临贬值压力
desc_original: The baht could slide beyond 33 to the US dollar, with high volatility possible if the war in the Middle East is prolonged, forcing Thailand, a net oil importer, to pay a significantly higher import bill, according to Kasikorn Research Center (K-Research).

title_cn: 🔄 中东冲突重创泰国远程旅游市场（Long-haul Markets），欧洲客源面临长期断档风险
desc_original: As the conflict in the Middle East weighs on global travel prices and travellers' pocketbooks, tourism operators project long-haul markets in 2026 will fall short of last year's 10 million arrivals.

desc_original: Thai equities still have downside risk amid heightened volatility as escalating tensions in the Middle East threaten global energy supply routes, with strategists warning only a handful of sectors are likely to withstand a prolonged crisis.

desc_original: Caretaker Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has instructed police to coordinate with Interpol to seek a red notice for fugitive businessman Benjamin Mauerberger, also known as "Ben Smith", amid ongoing asset seizures.

desc_original: SARABURI — 4 March 2026, In a reversal of traditional roles, a bride led the engagement procession and brought a 400,000 baht dowry to formally propose to her groom after more than eight years together. The wedding of Duanghathaimat Chaiwong, known as Ice, and Jirayuth Khamphu, known as Toy, was held at a club inside Adisorn Camp in Saraburi province. Family members and friends from both sides attended the ceremony in a joyful atmosphere. The highlight of the event was the khan mak procession, w
summary_cn: 沙拉武里府（Saraburi）一场婚礼打破传统习俗：新娘杜安哈泰马（Duanghathaimat Chaiwong，昵称Ice）亲自率领「汉玛」（Khan Mak）迎亲队伍，携40万铢彩礼向男方吉拉育（Jirayuth Khamphu，昵称Toy）正式求婚，二人已相恋逾八年。婚礼在阿迪森军营（Adisorn Camp）内举行，亲友见证了这一反传统角色的温馨时刻。

title_cn: 春武里（Chon Buri）比特犬（Pit Bull）咬伤外卖骑手，伤者感染就医，屋主称门锁未关
desc_original: Owner blames unsecured door as pit bull bites delivery driver Legacy A parcel delivery rider is seeking compensation after a pit bull attack left her with an infected wound during a delivery at a home in Chon Buri province, an incident the owner linked to an unsecured door. The case dates back to February 23, when the rider, identified as 49 year old Saifon, was bitten on the upper part of her right leg while attempting to deliver an order. She remains in treatment at Vibharam Amata Nakorn Hospi
summary_cn: 春武里府（Chon Buri）一名49岁外卖骑手赛丰（Saifon）在送货时被屋主饲养的比特犬（Pit Bull）咬伤大腿，伤口随后感染，仍在维帕拉阿玛他那空医院（Vibharam Amata Nakorn Hospital）接受治疗。屋主将此事归咎于门锁未关，受害者目前要求屋主承担赔偿责任，双方就责任归属产生争议。

title_cn: 普吉岛（Phuket）Choeng Talay牛排餐厅遭外籍食客"吃霸王餐"，监控拍下逃单全程
desc_original: Foreigner filmed leaving Phuket steakhouse without paying Legacy A Phuket dine and dash was reported after a foreign man left a steakhouse in Choeng Talay through a back door without paying yesterday, March 3. The Phuket Times Facebook page posted about the incident today, March 4, saying it happened at about 9pm last night at a steak restaurant in the Choeng Talay area. The page did not name the venue. According to the post, the man ordered what was described as the restaurant’s most premium st
summary_cn: 普吉岛程塔雷区（Choeng Talay）一家牛排餐厅于3月3日晚约9时遭遇「吃霸王餐」事件，一名外籍男子点了餐厅最高档牛排套餐后，趁机从后门溜走，全程被监控录像拍下。餐厅已向当地警方报案，并在社交媒体发布监控画面协助寻找肇事者，目前当事人下落不明。

title_cn: 罗勇（Rayong）惊悚案：约40岁女子骑摩托搭载两名15岁少年至橡胶园性骚扰
desc_original: Thai woman allegedly exposes breasts to 2 teenage boys Legacy Thai parents urged a woman to apologise after she exposed her breasts to two 15 year old boys on a quiet road in Ban Khai district in Rayong on February 28. According to Channel 7, a Thai man helped the teenagers and took them home after the woman, believed to be about 40 years old, persuaded them to travel with her on a motorcycle before sexually harassing them near a rubber plantation. The incident was reported to happen at about 1a
summary_cn: 2月28日，罗勇府（Rayong）班凯区（Ban Khai）发生涉嫌性骚扰案件，一名约40岁女子以免费带路为由，将两名15岁少年带至橡胶园僻静处，对其实施骚扰。一名路人及时介入将少年带离。两名少年家长事后报案，并呼吁女方公开道歉，案件已由警方受理调查。

title_cn: 泰国街头美食史：椰奶糕（Khanom Krok）的起源与东南亚各国同类食品
desc_original: Few Thai street snacks are as iconic as khanom krok, small round coconut rice cakes with a crisp shell and creamy centre. Made from rice flour, sugar and coconut milk, the dessert is traditionally cooked in a cast iron pan with small indentations over charcoal heat. Vendors pour two batters into each well, typically one lightly salted coconut base and one sweet topping, before pressing two half moons together into a single bite sized disc. Mont lin ma yar in Myanmar Variations of this coconut ba
summary_cn: 椰奶糕（Khanom Krok）是泰国最具代表性的街头小食之一，以米粉、糖和椰奶为主料，传统上用带小圆形凹槽的铸铁锅置于炭火上烹制，外壳酥脆、内芯嫩滑。文章追溯其历史渊源，并介绍东南亚各国的同类食品，如缅甸的蒙林马亚（Mont lin ma yar），展现这一小食在区域饮食文化中的共通性。

title_cn: 布里兰（Buriram）前夫驾皮卡冲入前妻聚会现场，撞伤8人，坚称意外
desc_original: Thai man claims accident after ramming pickup into ex-wife and 7 others Legacy A Thai man claimed an accident caused him to drive a pickup truck into a group of eight people at a restaurant in Buriram on Monday, March 2, injuring seven , including his ex-wife . Victims were not convinced and suspected jealousy may have been a motive. Bang Kruad Police Station received a report about the crash at about 9pm on Monday. Officers went to the scene with rescuers from the Sawang Janya Dham Foundation.
summary_cn: 3月2日晚9时，布里兰府（Buriram）一名男子被指驾驶皮卡冲入前妻所在的餐厅聚会现场，撞伤包括前妻在内的7人。嫌犯坚称属意外驾驶失控，但受害者及目击者对此说法存疑，认为背后可能存在嫉妒情感动机，案件已由警方立案调查。

title_cn: 泰国牙医奇案：患者鼻腔内发现牙齿穿入，TikTok视频引发百万浏览
desc_original: Thai dentist stunned by tooth protruding into patient’s nose Legacy A patient’s concern about a white object inside their nose has become an unusual dental treatment , after a Thai dentist, “Dr Mos”, said in a TikTok post today, March 4, that he found a tooth protruding into the nasal cavity. Posting a video on the TikTok account @drmosodc , the dentist said the patient had noticed a white object inside the nose for some time and sought a medical check-up due to concern. The cause was repo
summary_cn: 泰国牙医「莫斯医生」（Dr. Mos，TikTok账号@drmosodc）于3月4日发布视频，披露一起罕见病例：一名患者因长期发现鼻腔内有白色异物就诊，经检查发现系一颗牙齿穿入鼻腔所致。该视频发布后迅速获得数百万次浏览，引发网友对牙科解剖知识的广泛好奇与讨论。

title_cn: 芭提雅男子遭女邻居多次拒绝求爱后，在宿舍外自焚，全身约三至四成烧伤
desc_original: Thai man sets himself on fire after repeated love rejection Legacy Pattaya rescuers yesterday, March 3, saved a Thai man who set himself on fire outside a dormitory in Pattaya , following repeated rejection of his romantic advances . Rescue workers from the Sawang Borribun Dhammastan Foundation went to a one-storey dormitory and found the injured man, identified as 44 year old Boonlert, outside room four. DailyNews reported that Boonlert had burns covering about 30 to 40% of his body. Rescuers g
summary_cn: 3月3日，芭提雅救援人员在一处单层宿舍楼外将44岁男子汶勒（Boonlert）救起，其因长期追求女性邻居遭多次拒绝，情绪崩溃后在宿舍门外自焚，全身约30至40%面积烧伤。救援人员紧急将其送往医院救治，目前生命体征稳定，警方已就事件展开调查。

title_cn: 泰国野象入侵农田和居民区代价攀升，人象冲突（Human-Elephant Conflict）治理成本持续增加
desc_original: The death of a 20-year-old wild elephant during relocation in Loei has intensified scrutiny of the government's handling of escalating human-elephant conflict in the Northeast.
summary_cn: 泰国东北部廊开府（Loei）一头20岁野象在转移过程中死亡，此事件引发外界对政府处理人象冲突（Human-Elephant Conflict）方式的强烈质疑。野象持续侵占农田和居民区，造成财产损失和人员伤亡，政府现行的转移安置方案成本高企且效果存疑，相关治理政策面临日益严峻的社会审视。

title_cn: 宋卡府（Songkhla）争做泰南香椰之都，省长推动椰农价格扶持计划

desc_original: Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul joins a humanitarian flight under the “Hearts on Wings” program with the Thai Red Cross Society, deploying a Cirrus SR22T aircraft to transport surgeons from Siriraj Hospital to Surin for an urgent organ retrieval operation benefiting transplant patients. SURIN, Thailand – Prime Minister Anutin Charnvirakul has assigned a volunteer pilot with the Thai Red Cross Society to carry out an urgent organ transport mission in Surin province under the “Hearts on Wings”
summary_cn: 总理安努廷（Anutin Charnvirakul）亲赴素林府（Surin），参与泰国红十字会（Thai Red Cross Society）「心翼行动」（Hearts on Wings）紧急器官空运任务。本次任务动用Cirrus SR22T飞机，将诗里拉医院（Siriraj Hospital）外科医生紧急运抵素林执行器官摘取手术，所摘器官将用于等待移植的危重患者。

title_cn: 乌冬他尼（Udon Thani）男子当街猥亵被捕，警方以公共场所不雅罪起诉
desc_original: UDON THANI — 4 March 2026, A 43-year-old man was arrested on Wednesday after allegedly exposing himself in a public area in central Udon Thani, telling police he had lowered his trousers because of the heat. summary_cn: 警方确认九名嫌疑人与一起绑架杀人焚尸案有关。受害人鲁特（Rut Meneeprasert）于2月18日在曼谷失踪，母亲次日在沙统警察局（Sutthisan Police Station）报案。其焚毁遗体随后在华富里府（Lop Buri）一处民居被发现，警方已陆续逮捕九名涉案人员，案件动机及背景仍在深入调查中。

summary_cn: 3月3日，芭提雅副市长马诺（Manot）下令市政官员配合珂兰岛（Koh Larn）动物保护义工，将一条病危流浪犬紧急运送至大陆进行救治。此次联合救援行动获得当地居民和动物爱好者的广泛赞誉，体现了官民协作推动动物福利的积极姿态。

desc_original: By the time of the 2026 campaign, the Pitutechas had learned from their setback in the previous election. In Districts 3 and 4, they ran younger members of the family, better educated and with less of a godfather image than the older generation.

summary_cn: 大选结果显示，泰国选民在经历经济增长低迷和与柬埔寨边境冲突（波及近50万难民）的一年后，选择向军事和保皇建制派靠拢。进步改革力量在此次选举中受到明显压制，面对国内外双重不确定性，泰国选民整体倾向于保守的政治稳定选项，建制派成功稳守政坛主导地位。

title_cn: 🔄 泰国楼市已越过底部：二手房带动成交，俄罗斯和台湾买家强势增长补充中国买家缩水
desc_original: Chinese buyers remain the main group; although their volumes and value declined, Russian and Taiwanese buyers posted standout growth. A more diversified foreign demand base could help improve the long-term resilience of Thailand’s condo market.

title_cn: 曼谷崛起为泰国下一个数据中心枢纽：相比新加坡扩张空间更大、延迟更低
desc_original: This makes Thailand an ideal regional hub for: Cloud infrastructure distribution · Content delivery networks (CDNs) Enterprise applications · Compared to Singapore, which faces infrastructure saturation, Bangkok provides room for expansion. Business impact: Companies can serve millions of users across Southeast Asia with lower latency and lower operating costs. February 27, 2026 ·

title_cn: 普吉城（Phuket Town）366台CCTV联网24小时控制室，智慧安防系统全面扩容
desc_original: In Phuket Town, more than 366 CCTV cameras are linked to a central control room that operates 24 hours a day. The project aims to increase coverage throughout the city and thus enable faster detection and response to incidents.
summary_cn: 普吉城（Phuket Town）已完成对366台以上闭路电视（CCTV）摄像头的联网整合，统一接入24小时运营的中央控制室，实现城区全覆盖监控。该智慧安防项目旨在大幅提升事件发现和应急响应速度，是普吉府持续推进智慧城市建设的重要组成部分。

title_cn: 普吉岛拉威（Rawai）公共海滩出现外国游客裸晒，居民呼吁官方介入
desc_original: PHUKET — Residents in Rawai have raised concerns over foreign tourists sunbathing and swimming naked on a public beach, questioning whether the practice is appropriate and calling on authorities to investigate. On 2 March 2026, the Facebook page “Phuket Info Center” posted four photos showing foreign visitors reportedly sunbathing nude at a beach in Rawai subdistrict, Muang district. The images triggered widespread debate online. The post asked whether a so-called “nude beach” in Phuket was suit
summary_cn: 普吉岛拉威区（Rawai）居民向当局反映，有外国游客在当地公共海滩裸体日晒和游泳，质疑此举是否符合当地文化和法律规范。「Phuket Info Center」于3月2日发布现场照片后，引发网络热议，当地居民呼吁官方尽快介入调查并采取管理措施，明确公共海滩相关行为规范。

title_cn: ASOS联合创始人昆廷·格里菲斯（Quentin Griffiths）芭提雅坠亡后，泰籍前妻争夺子女监护权
desc_original: Thai ex-wife of ASOS co-founder seeks child custody after his death Legacy A Thai woman is seeking custody of her three children following the death of her British ex-husband, ASOS co-founder Quentin Griffiths , alleging she was prevented from seeing them for nearly five years following their divorce . The 58 year old British businessman, Griffiths, was found dead on February 9 after falling from his 18th-floor apartment in Pattaya . Police said they suspected suicide , reporting the room was lo
summary_cn: ASOS联合创始人、58岁英国商人昆廷·格里菲斯（Quentin Griffiths）于2月9日被发现坠亡于芭提雅一处18楼公寓，警方初步判断为自杀。其泰籍前妻随即申请三名子女的监护权，并指控自离婚后被长达近五年阻止探视孩子，案件涉及跨国家庭法律纠纷和遗产争议，引发国际媒体关注。

title_cn: 曼谷设计周（Bangkok Design Week）2026：城市遗产活化与创意经济并重，定位亚洲创意枢纽
desc_original: Together, these efforts frame restoration as a strategic pillar of urban cultural asset management - revitalizing historic districts, generating economic vitality, and strengthening a creative business ecosystem that grows sustainably from the city's existing foundations. LAHI (Heritage): The Philippine Fashion Exhibition · Fashion as Cultural Diplomacy and a New Economic Bridge in ASEAN ... Representing the Philippines, Bangkok Design Week 2026 serves as the launch platform for "LAHI
summary_cn: 曼谷设计周（Bangkok Design Week）2026以城市遗产活化（Heritage Restoration）为战略核心，将历史街区复兴与创意经济发展相结合，旨在构建可持续的创意商业生态系统。本届活动同时承担国际文化交流平台功能，包括菲律宾时装展览「LAHI」，以曼谷为东盟（ASEAN）创意经济合作的发布平台，定位亚洲创意枢纽。

title_cn: 阿提哈德航空（Etihad）2026年10月起派A380执飞阿布扎比—曼谷苏万纳普（Suvarnabhumi）航线
desc_original: The aircraft will operate on Etihad’s evening daily service between Abu Dhabi’s Zayed International Airport and Bangkok Suvarnabhumi, further strengthening connectivity between Southeast Asia, the Middle East and Europe as the airline adds capacity ahead of the busy winter season · As noted, the A380 will operate on the airline’s evening flight. Timings are as follows: EY402 DEPART AUH 21:10 ARRIVE BKK 06:35+1 EY403 DEPART BKK 08:30 ARRIVE AUH 12:20 Commences 29th October 2026 Operates Daily Boo
summary_cn: 阿提哈德航空（Etihad Airways）宣布，自2026年10月29日起，将在阿布扎比扎耶德国际机场（Zayed International Airport）至曼谷苏万纳普（Suvarnabhumi）每日航班上引入A380客机执飞，为每日固定班次。去程EY402于21:10从阿布扎比出发，次日06:35抵达曼谷；回程EY403于08:30从曼谷出发，12:20抵达阿布扎比，进一步强化东南亚、中东与欧洲之间的航空连接。
